name: 5V DC Cooling Fan

pins.vcc: Power (Red wire) — connect to +5V via transistor/MOSFET

transistor_note: Fan draws 100-200mA which exceeds Arduino pin limit of 40mA. MUST use NPN transistor (e.g., PN2222, TIP120) or N-channel MOSFET (IRLZ44N) to switch power. Add a flyback diode (1N4007) across fan terminals.
description: 2-wire DC brushless cooling fan. Red=VCC, Black=GND. Draws 100-200mA — DO NOT connect directly to Arduino digital pin. Use a transistor/MOSFET to switch it.
